channel.title: P3 Lending Blog
channel.description: Product updates and essays from the P3 Lending team.

item.title: Developer API Launch
item.description: We shipped the first version of the P3 Developer API with API keys, scopes, and reputation score endpoints.

item.title: Reputation Scoring, Phase 1
item.description: An overview of the first phase of P3's 0–1000 reputation scoring model.
